title: impatiens arguta var. walongensis
intro: Impatiens arguta var. walongensis, also known as Balsam or Busy Lizzie, is a variety of the Impatiens arguta plant, which is a flowering plant native to Asia. The medicinal properties of Impatiens arguta var. walongensis include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. This plant has several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and alleviating pain. The herbal preparations of Impatiens arguta var. walongensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as colds, coughs, and digestive issues.
